column1: # /File Retrieve dispatches by extension: `.csv` loads the file as a
# fresh workbook starting at A1 (not an overlay onto the pointer like
# /File Import Numbers), wiping the in-memory workbook first.
# Uses the existing fixture at tests/acceptance/fixtures/m4_import.csv:
# Dirty A1 and move the pointer so we can prove the retrieve wipes
# state and lands at A1 regardless of where the pointer was.
